name: Fresh Egg Pasta-Mario
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a mound of the flour in the center of a large wooden cutting board.
2. Make a well in the middle of the flour and add the eggs, olive oil, and any other flavoring you choose.
3. Using a fork, beat together the eggs, olive oil, and flavorings, then begin to incorporate the flour starting with the inner rim of the well.
4. As you expand the well, keep pushing the flour up to retain the well shape. Do not worry that this initial phase looks messy; the dough will come together when half of the flour is incorporated.
5. Start kneading the dough with both hands, using the palms of your hands primarily. Once a cohesive mass is formed, remove the dough from the board and scrape up any leftover crusty bits.
6. Lightly flour the board and continue kneading for 3 more minutes until the dough is elastic and slightly sticky.
7. Continue to knead for another 3 minutes, dusting the board with flour as necessary.
8. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and allow it to rest at room temperature for 30 minutes. Note: Do not skip the kneading or resting portion of this recipe; they are essential for light pasta.
Yield: 1 pound
